title: delivery: actor_uri_for_key extracted by re-parsing body bytes
description: In process_batch (delivery.rs:217-222), the actor URI is derived by deserializing the already-serialized body bytes and calling .as_str().unwrap_or(""). If the field is absent or empty, key_id becomes "#main-key" — a bare fragment — and signing proceeds with a nonsense key_id silently. The actor URI is already available: it was used to build the activity JSON three lines earlier. Fix: capture actor_uri into the post_cache tuple (or re-derive it from the post_cache-stored body before serialization) instead of round-tripping through JSON.
